title: AI API Costs Are Skyrocketing! Get Ready for the SHOCK! #shorts
summary: AI API costs are rising significantly, requiring businesses to reconsider their approaches. The video suggests using tools like Claude's Artifacts as internal SaaS solutions to mitigate costs while preserving innovation capacity.
writeup: This short argues that AI API costs are rising significantly, pushing businesses to rethink how they build and budget for AI features. The concrete takeaway: tools like Claude's Artifacts can serve as internal SaaS solutions, cutting reliance on external paid services while keeping room for innovation. It frames the shift as a cost optimization and SaaS disruption question rather than a feature one.
